_doc: User-facing UI text. Edit here to change copy without touching code. Tone: warm, grounded, never clinical. No purple gradients, no sparkles, no "Build your dreams" filler.

app.name: MUN MIND
app.tagline: A private space to check in with yourself.
app.longDescription: An anonymous mental health check-in companion for Memorial University students.

landing.heading: How are you actually doing?
landing.subheading: Take a minute for yourself. No account, no tracking, no strings.

trustSignals.title: Completely anonymous
trustSignals.description: No login, no email, no tracking. Nothing you share here is ever linked to you.

trustSignals.title: Not a replacement for real support
trustSignals.description: This is a check-in, not therapy. We'll point you to real help whenever you need it.

trustSignals.title: Built for MUN students
trustSignals.description: Made by students at Memorial University. Connected to real campus and NL resources.

privacy.bodyText: At MUN MIND, your privacy isn't a policy — it's the foundation of this space. We want you to feel safe sharing what's on your mind.
points: No account needed. There's nothing to sign up for.
Your conversation isn't saved after you close this tab.
We never collect your name, email, or student number.
An anonymous mood score (1–5) may be stored to help MUN understand how students are doing — never linked to you.
No one at MUN can see what you share here.
If you're in crisis, we'll show you real support resources right away.
privacy.ackCheckbox: I understand this is not counselling or therapy.

campusSelector.heading: Which campus are you on?
campusSelector.subheading: We'll show you the right resources. This is the only thing we'll ever ask about you.

chat.greeting: Hey. Welcome to MUN MIND. This is a private check-in — nothing here is saved or shared. How are you feeling today?
chat.disclaimer: MUN MIND is not counselling or therapy. If you need support, help is available.
chat.moodWidgetHeading: How would you describe your mood right now?

mood.historySubheading: Stored only on your device. Never shared. Clear anytime.
mood.emptyState: Nothing here yet. Start a check-in to track how you're feeling.

crisis.bannerHeading: It sounds like you might be going through something really serious.
crisis.bannerBody: You don't have to handle this alone. The people below are ready to talk right now.

errors.apiFailure: I'm having trouble connecting right now. This sometimes happens.
errors.apiFailureResourcesLead: If you need support right now, these resources are available 24/7:
errors.offline: You're offline. Your messages will send when you reconnect.
errors.offlineResourcesLead: You can still call these numbers:
errors.rateLimited: I've reached my limit for today. I'll be back tomorrow.
errors.rateLimitedResourcesLead: In the meantime, here are people you can talk to right now:

session.summaryClosingMessage: Thanks for checking in. It's okay to come back anytime.
session.summaryNotSavedNote: This summary won't be saved after you close the tab.
